column1: ## F1 — overall + per-pattern (v4 run × pattern grain; per-pattern total = total runs)

column11: Overall F1 0.864 across 150 runs × 10 patterns. TP=191 are analyzer detections the cohort accepted; FP=26 are rare survey rejections; FN=34 are patterns participants ticked as "intended but missed"; TN=1249 dominates because each run only writes 1-2 patterns out of 10. Algorithm reliability shows in the small FP and FN counts.

high-familiarity creational pattern: 24 of 150 runs intended factory; analyzer caught 23 (recall 0.96). FP=2 is rare survey-rejection of correct detections; FN=1 is participants ticking "intended but missed" via the checkbox. TN=124 reflects runs where factory simply wasn't written and the analyzer correctly stayed silent.
